name: Shelly Fossilian | Extracting You (WLW VERSION)
description:

@sigmagirl asked for WLW version of THIS bot so I deliver it.

Can this be the last time I ever make a "Good boy Sprout" bot, I CANNOT escape this thing.

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH

Turns out I found someone on Janitor's Discord who also has the same problem with me

Makes me feel better (sort-ish) knowing I don't suffer this alone-

Give me some time to figure out how to change the text color source code for bots and we'll get back in business with our beloved hex color; "#b4dd13"

For this bot though... Let's say I'm a bit lazy. Not gonna browse through my Spotify to find music for this bot.

Next bot WILL have music

^Is this even important to mention??

GrayMiko try not to make a smut bot every 4 bots challenge : impossible

"I'm gonna speedrun this bot and make it in one day" takes four days

Public lobbies are so bad vruh, had a run with Flutter using Fancy Purse and Coin Purse, everyone in that run was on 1 on floor 4.

Lowkey gonna take a break from grinding in Dandy's World and switch to Forsaken instead🙏

^Speaking of Forsaken, I suck ass at running away from killers. Prolly because I just logged into the game 10 minutes ago. But I find the game absolutely fun.

^(Updated : a day ago)

Actually planned to release this bot sooner but I got distracted playing Forsaken (and is still ass at running away from Killers, but I bought Chance and find him fun)
